title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Titan Eyeplus - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Titan Eyeplus - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
